chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يُوجِبُ الْغُسْلَ عَلَى الرَّجُلِ وَ الْمَرْأَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 30 – What Obligates the washing upon the man and the woman

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/141)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/141)
text: سَأَلْتُ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَلْمِسُ فَرْجَ جَارِيَتِهِ حَتَّى تُنْزِلَ الْمَاءَ مِنْ غَيْرِ أَنْ يُبَاشِرَ يَعْبَثُ بِهَا بِيَدِهِ حَتَّى تُنْزِلَ قَالَ إِذَا أَنْزَلَتْ مِنْ شَهْوَةٍ فَعَلَيْهَا الْغُسْلُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ismail Bin Sa’ad Al Ashary who said,

‘I asked Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about the man who touches the private part of a girl until the water descends from without him (any other) physical contact, (just) playing with her by his hand until he discharges’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When she discharges from the excitement, so the washing is upon her’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Tsma‘il ibn Sa‘d al-Ash’ariy who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida, Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who touches and plays by his hand with the private parts of his slave-girl without contact of his private part until she feels discharge, is Ghusl (bath) necessary on her? He (the Imam) said, ‘Ghusl (bath) is necessary if discharge is accompanied by orgasm.’”
